title: Corymborkis angustifolia

This family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. The genus Corymborkis is a small and unusual group of orchids, and Corymborkis angustifolia is one of the few species within it. The classification of Corymborkis angustifolia is further broken down into the subfamily Vanilloideae, which is a group of orchids characterized by their unique seed pods.
